sourcePolicy.included: NIST public information/public-domain assets and Wikimedia Commons files with explicit license metadata.
sourcePolicy.excluded: Commercial/blog/university examples without clear redistribution terms are listed for review only.

reviewOnlySources.name: University of Illinois ME170 Engineering Drawing Notes
reviewOnlySources.reason: Useful GD&T teaching drawings, but redistribution/license terms were not explicit in the search result.

reviewOnlySources.name: GD&T Basics feature control frame/datum examples
reviewOnlySources.reason: High-quality examples for visual review; use as design reference unless permission is granted.

reviewOnlySources.name: KEYENCE GD&T overview examples
reviewOnlySources.reason: High-quality commercial reference examples; not downloaded into training data without permission.

reviewOnlySources.name: NASA internship final report GD&T discussion
reviewOnlySources.reason: Public technical report with GD&T context, but it does not appear to be a dense drawing corpus.
